site.title: TRPA Maps
site.subtitle: Mapping applications of the Tahoe Regional Planning Agency

categories.name: Planning
categories.description: Zoning, local plans, transportation, housing, and shoreline maps supporting the Regional Plan.

categories.name: Permitting
categories.description: Parcel lookup, permit records, and property information tools.

categories.name: Environmental Improvement
categories.description: Environmental Improvement Program (EIP) maps for stormwater, forest health, and restoration.

categories.name: Data and Tools
categories.description: General map viewers, open data, and resources for GIS users and developers.

apps.title: Local Plans and Zoning
apps.description: Explore zoning for the Lake Tahoe Region. Click individual plan area statements, community plans, and area plans for zoning information and links to plan documents.

apps.title: Transportation Map
apps.description: Existing and proposed transit routes, active transportation facilities, areas identified for safety improvements, crash locations, and electric vehicle charging stations.

apps.title: Housing Resources
apps.description: Housing resources web map for the Tahoe Region.

apps.title: Shoreline Plan Map
apps.description: Current inventory of shoreline structures, natural features, and environmental constraints along the 72 miles of Lake Tahoe shoreline.

apps.title: Permit Review Map
apps.description: Displays the map layers necessary to review a TRPA permit application.

apps.title: Parcel and Permit Records
apps.description: Look up parcel details, permit records, land capability, and coverage information on Lake Tahoe Info.

apps.title: EIP Projects Map
apps.description: Every Environmental Improvement Program (EIP) project with a known location on an interactive 2D and 3D map. Filter by focus area, stage, watershed, jurisdiction, program, and funding source.

apps.title: Project Locator
apps.description: Make consistent, branded locator maps for presentations and reports. Search an address, APN, or EIP project, pick a style and layout, and export a PowerPoint slide or PNG.

apps.title: BMP Mapping Tool
apps.description: View best management practices (BMPs) layers, catchments, and APN labels. Locate parcels by address, APN, or catchment name and export selections.

apps.title: Tahoe SEZ Viewer
apps.description: Stream environment zone (SEZ) baseline condition assessment web map for the Lake Tahoe Basin.

apps.title: 48-Hour Smoke Forecast
apps.description: Smoke forecast for the Tahoe Basin and surrounding region, updated every 24 hours by the National Weather Service. Concentrations reported in micrograms per cubic meter.

apps.title: Map Maker
apps.description: Interactive web map for exploring TRPA datasets. Turn layers on and off and export a map to PDF.

apps.title: Story Map Gallery
apps.description: Gallery of narrative story maps published by TRPA on ArcGIS Online. Loads live from TRPA's organization, newest first.

apps.title: Tahoe Data Inventory
apps.description: Searchable inventory of 263 data assets across Tahoe Open Data, LT Info, and the maps.trpa.org REST services directory. Filter by source and channel, and export the list to CSV.

apps.title: Open Data Policy and Developer Guide
apps.description: How to use and access data published on tahoeopendata.org, including attribution, delivery channels, and developer examples.

apps.title: Tahoe Open Data
apps.description: Regional geographic data warehouse for the Tahoe Basin. Download GIS data and connect to shared services.

apps.title: ArcGIS REST Services
apps.description: ArcGIS Server REST services directory for developers building on TRPA data.
